11 Amathus 6 Anjaal / Oratorio 9-9 David Probert Patrick Chamings 64 52 16160- 39.8 3.8% 26.1 20.2 23.00 +0.6pp
📰 Often came to hand early in the past but is getting on now and has never won first time out; carries a big weight, ideally suited by an easy 7f and today's stiff 1m doesn't appeal as optimal.
🧠 Modest ratings for this level; modest recent form, may need this run for fitness; going may not suit; top jockey booked; market doesn't agree — proceed with caution.
🧢 28W/166R 17% IV 1.61
12 Mishy's Star 14 Due Diligence / Kodiac 3.0 9-1 (-8) Hollie Doyle Keiran Burke 60 - 8-7530 38.9 3.4% 29.1 20.2 34.00 +2.0pp
📰 Exposed as ordinary on the AW, placed just once from ten starts; needs to improve a good deal for the switch to turf.
🧠 Modest ratings for this level; modest recent form, on a declining curve, fit and race-ready; top jockey booked; market doesn't agree — proceed with caution.
🏋 1W/10R 10% IV 0.88🧢 15W/77R 19% IV 1.85
13 James Park Woods 9 Australia / Holy Roman Emperor 1.1 9-5 (-4) Rob Hornby Dominic Ffrench Davis 67 46 11667- 38.3 3.2% 31.4 20.2 26.00 +1.1pp
📰 All four wins have come on good to soft/soft ground in September, including over C&D last autumn off 6lb lower; record returning from a break down the years is far from inspiring.
🧠 Modest ratings for this level; modest recent form, on a declining curve, may need this run for fitness; going may not suit; good course record; market doesn't agree — proceed with caution.
🧢 14W/166R 8% IV 0.80
14 Red Admiral 3 Dark Angel / Awtaad 3.0 9-6 (-3) Jack Doughty John Gallagher 66 46 57746- 37.5 2.9% 34.7 20.2 26.00 +1.1pp
📰 Couple of costly defeats for George Boughey early last year, not looking the easiest; more of the same in three runs for his current yard and there are obvious risks back up in trip in a first-time hood after eight months off; likely has the ability though.
🧠 Modest ratings for this level; modest recent form, on a declining curve, may need this run for fitness; going may not suit; good course record; market doesn't agree — proceed with caution.

  {
    "course": "Southwell (AW)",
    "time": "13:55",
    "race_name": "GB Civil Engineering Handicap",
    "type": "flat",
    "surface": "AW",
    "dist": "6f",
    "going": "Standard",
    "class": "Class 6",
    "draw_bias": "low",
    "draw_strength": 2,
    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,
        "horse": "Tuscan Point",
        "jockey": "Taryn Langley(5)",
        "trainer": "Adam Kirby",
        "ts": "67",
        "rpr": "79",
        "or": "65",
        "form": "563-12",
        "sire": "Blue Point",
        "dam_sire": "Oasis Dream",
        "stall": 6,
        "weight": "9-9",
        "score": "58.2",
        "model_pct": "29.7%",
        "fair_odds": "3.37",
        "best_dec": "3.50",
        "edge": "-8.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Has done well in two starts since joining Adam Kirby with this headgear combination, winning easily on his return from 149 days off over C&D last month and only going down by half a length back here ten days later following a 10lb rise; much respected from the same mark."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Andalprofit",
        "jockey": "Alex Jary(3)",
        "trainer": "Nigel Tinkler",
        "ts": "71",
        "rpr": "79",
        "or": "62",
        "form": "18-462",
        "sire": "Profitable",
        "dam_sire": "Jeremy",
        "stall": 1,
        "weight": "9-6",
        "score": "51.3",
        "model_pct": "14.0%",
        "fair_odds": "7.17",
        "best_dec": "7.00",
        "edge": "-0.3pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Sole AW success came at Newcastle (6f, Tapeta) a year ago and was only beaten a neck having attempted to make all back there 15 days ago; not the most consistent, though, and well held in both previous goes over C&D."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Good Earth",
        "jockey": "Connor Planas(3)",
        "trainer": "Michael Herrington",
        "ts": "52",
        "rpr": "76",
        "or": "68",
        "form": "-41861",
        "sire": "Acclamation",
        "dam_sire": "Dream Ahead",
        "stall": 3,
        "weight": "9-12",
        "score": "50.9",
        "model_pct": "13.3%",
        "fair_odds": "7.50",
        "best_dec": "7.00",
        "edge": "-0.3pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Made it 4-15 under Connor Planas when gaining his second C&D success ten days ago; did it comfortably enough and despite a 5lb higher mark, is a major player if in the same form; stable also runs Melissa Honey."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Fenlander",
        "jockey": "Callum Shepherd",
        "trainer": "Pam Sly",
        "ts": "55",
        "rpr": "77",
        "or": "60",
        "form": "35623-",
        "sire": "Territories",
        "dam_sire": "Oasis Dream",
        "stall": 5,
        "weight": "9-4",
        "score": "50.4",
        "model_pct": "12.7%",
        "fair_odds": "7.90",
        "best_dec": "6.00",
        "edge": "-2.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Placed a few times, including in two starts under positive rides over C&D in November, but now 0-13 and he may need this after 135 days off."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Beelzebub",
        "jockey": "Jack Callan(5)",
        "trainer": "David Loughnane",
        "ts": "62",
        "rpr": "76",
        "or": "58",
        "form": "8-7644",
        "sire": "Dark Angel",
        "dam_sire": "Camacho",
        "stall": 9,
        "weight": "9-2",
        "score": "47.4",
        "model_pct": "9.1%",
        "fair_odds": "10.98",
        "best_dec": "6.50",
        "edge": "-4.3pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Losing run up to 19, but he has dropped a long way in the weights and met all sorts of trouble when fourth of 11 over C&D last time (Starsong second); withdrawn at the start on vet's advice in the race won by Good Earth here ten days ago; worth considering."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "Starsong",
        "jockey": "Luke Morris",
        "trainer": "Michael Appleby",
        "ts": "48",
        "rpr": "76",
        "or": "56",
        "form": "1299-2",
        "sire": "Starspangledbanner",
        "dam_sire": "Excelebration",
        "stall": 2,
        "weight": "9-0",
        "score": "46.5",
        "model_pct": "8.2%",
        "fair_odds": "12.13",
        "best_dec": "8.50",
        "edge": "-4.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "C&D winner who made a fine return from 129 days off when beaten a neck by a subsequent winner here last month (Beelzebub an unlucky fourth); only 1lb higher and should go well again."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,
        "horse": "Daytona Lady",
        "jockey": "James Sullivan",
        "trainer": "Ruth Carr",
        "ts": "75",
        "rpr": "77",
        "or": "63",
        "form": "80376-",
        "sire": "Bungle Inthejungle",
        "dam_sire": "Cityscape",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "9-7",
        "score": "41.6",
        "model_pct": "4.8%",
        "fair_odds": "20.69",
        "best_dec": "23.00",
        "edge": "+0.6pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Six-time winner on the AW including two over C&D, but losing run up to 16 despite a slipping mark; not seen in 162 days and probably best watched unless the market suggests otherwise."
      },
      {
        "rank": 8,
        "horse": "Melissa Honey",
        "jockey": "Jason Hart",
        "trainer": "Michael Herrington",
        "ts": "53",
        "rpr": "76",
        "or": "54",
        "form": "37408-",
        "sire": "Showcasing",
        "dam_sire": "Slade Power",
        "stall": 7,
        "weight": "8-12",
        "score": "41.2",
        "model_pct": "4.6%",
        "fair_odds": "21.62",
        "best_dec": "15.00",
        "edge": "-1.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "0-11 and ended last season with two modest efforts; returns from five months off and stable fields a much stronger candidate in Good Earth."
      },
      {
        "rank": 9,
        "horse": "Neyva's Angel",
        "jockey": "Oisin Orr",
        "trainer": "Martin Dunne",
        "ts": "56",
        "rpr": "74",
        "or": "64",
        "form": "494-57",
        "sire": "Harry Angel",
        "dam_sire": "Invincible Spirit",
        "stall": 8,
        "weight": "9-8",
        "score": "38.9",
        "model_pct": "3.6%",
        "fair_odds": "27.92",
        "best_dec": "13.00",
        "edge": "-2.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Close third of six on her Yarmouth debut (6f, good to soft) last May, but she hasn't built on it and now 0-8, the hood making little difference last time; hard to recommend back in trip."
      }
    ]
  },
  {
    "course": "Bath",
    "time": "14:00",
    "race_name": "Weatherbys Global Stallions App Handicap",
    "type": "flat",
    "surface": "Turf",
    "dist": "5f",
    "going": "Good",
    "class": "Class 5",
    "draw_bias": "low",
    "draw_strength": 2,
    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,
        "horse": "Solar Invincible",
        "jockey": "Billy Loughnane",
        "trainer": "Roger Teal",
        "ts": "50",
        "rpr": "72",
        "or": "63",
        "form": "421-34",
        "sire": "Invincible Army",
        "dam_sire": "Dansili",
        "stall": 6,
        "weight": "9-2",
        "score": "55.7",
        "model_pct": "22.6%",
        "fair_odds": "4.42",
        "best_dec": "4.50",
        "edge": "-2.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Ended his 2yo campaign with a 5f win at Chelmsford in December; two solid efforts this year, more recently when fourth at Lingfield nine days ago (tight for room close home); promise on turf last year; still open to further progress."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Rogue Rebellion",
        "jockey": "Hollie Doyle",
        "trainer": "Ronald Harris",
        "ts": "59",
        "rpr": "74",
        "or": "51",
        "form": "59-612",
        "sire": "Ardad",
        "dam_sire": "Frozen Power",
        "stall": 7,
        "weight": "8-4",
        "score": "52.7",
        "model_pct": "17.3%",
        "fair_odds": "5.79",
        "best_dec": "7.50",
        "edge": "+6.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Two good runs since dropping back to 5f, winning at Lingfield in January and second at Newcastle seven weeks ago; sold out of James Owen's stable for 10,000gns soon after that latest run; more needed but not fully exposed just yet."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Luna Beaux",
        "jockey": "Finley Marsh",
        "trainer": "Adrian Wintle",
        "ts": "41",
        "rpr": "77",
        "or": "60",
        "form": "7-1641",
        "sire": "Saxon Warrior",
        "dam_sire": "Arcano",
        "stall": 1,
        "weight": "8-13",
        "score": "50.7",
        "model_pct": "14.5%",
        "fair_odds": "6.92",
        "best_dec": "6.00",
        "edge": "-2.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Ex-Irish filly who has won two of her four starts for her new stable, most recently getting up close home at Wolverhampton 19 days ago; only 1lb higher and makes more appeal than many."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Dragon Spin",
        "jockey": "Dougie Costello",
        "trainer": "Steph Hollinshead",
        "ts": "54",
        "rpr": "72",
        "or": "61",
        "form": "26422-",
        "sire": "Ardad",
        "dam_sire": "Oasis Dream",
        "stall": 2,
        "weight": "9-0",
        "score": "47.7",
        "model_pct": "11.0%",
        "fair_odds": "9.05",
        "best_dec": "8.00",
        "edge": "+1.4pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Beaten under 3l in each of her three nursery runs last year (AW and soft); needs to have improved over the winter to make a winning return to action."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Runamara",
        "jockey": "Charles Bishop",
        "trainer": "John & Rhys Flint",
        "ts": "85",
        "rpr": "75",
        "or": "59",
        "form": "70-852",
        "sire": "Ribchester",
        "dam_sire": "Big Bad Bob",
        "stall": 3,
        "weight": "8-12",
        "score": "45.3",
        "model_pct": "8.9%",
        "fair_odds": "11.26",
        "best_dec": "3.50",
        "edge": "-21.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "His 2yo win came at this track (5.7f, soft); running himself back into form for new stable, never out of the first two when second to an unexposed opponent at Kempton on Wednesday (6f); still inclined to over-race but dropping back in trip might help."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "Beach Partee",
        "jockey": "Kieran O'Neill",
        "trainer": "Scott Dixon",
        "ts": "63",
        "rpr": "73",
        "or": "65",
        "form": "6175-2",
        "sire": "Lope Y Fernandez",
        "dam_sire": "Zebedee",
        "stall": 8,
        "weight": "9-4",
        "score": "44.0",
        "model_pct": "7.9%",
        "fair_odds": "12.64",
        "best_dec": "9.00",
        "edge": "-3.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Three nursery wins for William Knight last year and second to a handicap blot at Lingfield when last seen ten weeks ago; sold for 12,000gns in February; best turf form on good or slower."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,
        "horse": "Bellini Spirit",
        "jockey": "William Carson",
        "trainer": "John & Rhys Flint",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "73",
        "or": "66",
        "form": "72-7",
        "sire": "Sioux Nation",
        "dam_sire": "Peintre Celebre",
        "stall": 9,
        "weight": "9-5",
        "score": "43.0",
        "model_pct": "7.2%",
        "fair_odds": "13.81",
        "best_dec": "26.00",
        "edge": "+3.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Promise on her second start for Anthony Carson, finishing second of seven at Chelmsford last October (6f, AW); easy to back and finished well beaten in a 1m maiden at Lingfield on stable debut six weeks ago; needs a market check dropping in trip for her handicap/turf debut."
      },
      {
        "rank": 8,
        "horse": "Jenny Jerome",
        "jockey": "Alistair Rawlinson",
        "trainer": "Simon Hodgson",
        "ts": "40",
        "rpr": "73",
        "or": "64",
        "form": "75303-",
        "sire": "Churchill",
        "dam_sire": "Oasis Dream",
        "stall": 5,
        "weight": "9-3",
        "score": "41.7",
        "model_pct": "6.4%",
        "fair_odds": "15.54",
        "best_dec": "26.00",
        "edge": "+3.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Five runs in fillies' novice events as a 2yo (5f-6f), showing her best form when a close third at Nottingham in July (third start; 5f,  good to soft); more realistic chance now handicapping; betting can guide after her six months off."
      },
      {
        "rank": 9,
        "horse": "Believeinmenow",
        "jockey": "Faye McManoman",
        "trainer": "Nigel Tinkler",
        "ts": "76",
        "rpr": "74",
        "or": "70",
        "form": "29594-",
        "sire": "Ubettabelieveit",
        "dam_sire": "Acclamation",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "9-9",
        "score": "36.8",
        "model_pct": "4.1%",
        "fair_odds": "24.13",
        "best_dec": "11.00",
        "edge": "-4.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Attracted support on his 2yo debut and ran well for second of ten in a 5f maiden at Thirsk (good ground); no progress afterwards but his one run in a handicap saw him keep on well for a closing ninth, beaten 3l, in a Class 2 at York's Ebor meeting; gelded over the winter; stiff 5f should be fine and he's likely to be held up which won't be a bad thing if the forecast strong headwind arrives; stable 6-43 at Bath with another 19 finishing either second or third; interesting dropped into a Class 5."
      }
    ]
  },

  {
    "course": "Southwell (AW)",
    "time": "14:31",
    "race_name": "Heggs Family Handicap",
    "type": "flat",
    "surface": "AW",
    "dist": "7f",
    "going": "Standard",
    "class": "Class 4",
    "draw_bias": "none",
    "draw_strength": 2,
    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,
        "horse": "Henry Halflight",
        "jockey": "Billy Garritty",
        "trainer": "Liam Bailey",
        "ts": "48",
        "rpr": "85",
        "or": "71",
        "form": "271",
        "sire": "Dawn Approach",
        "dam_sire": "Danehill",
        "stall": 6,
        "weight": "8-9",
        "score": "59.0",
        "model_pct": "22.6%",
        "fair_odds": "4.42",
        "best_dec": "11.00",
        "edge": "+11.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "All three starts at Newcastle; narrowly getting off the mark in a slowly run 7f novice last month (runner-up Blue Mantle runs in the 3.06); has more on his plate on this handicap debut, but he remains unexposed."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "French Affair",
        "jockey": "Joe Leavy",
        "trainer": "Richard Hannon",
        "ts": "82",
        "rpr": "92",
        "or": "77",
        "form": "1324-2",
        "sire": "Mehmas",
        "dam_sire": "Exceed And Excel",
        "stall": 1,
        "weight": "9-1",
        "score": "57.9",
        "model_pct": "20.4%",
        "fair_odds": "4.90",
        "best_dec": "3.75",
        "edge": "-6.6pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Consistent since narrowly making a successful nursery debut at Newbury (6f, good) last August, including when beaten a head at Kempton (7f, Polytrack) 18 days ago on his return from six months off; 2lb higher but has fewer questions to answer than most of these; major player."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Colori Forever",
        "jockey": "Marco Ghiani",
        "trainer": "Marco Botti",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "90",
        "or": "84",
        "form": "152-",
        "sire": "Bated Breath",
        "dam_sire": "Territories",
        "stall": 8,
        "weight": "9-8",
        "score": "57.5",
        "model_pct": "19.7%",
        "fair_odds": "5.09",
        "best_dec": "2.50",
        "edge": "-19.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Ran well in all three starts last year, making a successful debut at Yarmouth (7f, good to firm) and going down by half a length to a subsequent winner in a four-runner Doncaster nursery (7f, heavy) on her final outing; out of an AW winner and worth a second look if ready to go after 162 days off."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Loblolly",
        "jockey": "Jack Callan(5)",
        "trainer": "S Woods",
        "ts": "88",
        "rpr": "91",
        "or": "80",
        "form": "82216-",
        "sire": "Invincible Spirit",
        "dam_sire": "Harbour Watch",
        "stall": 7,
        "weight": "9-4",
        "score": "53.1",
        "model_pct": "13.1%",
        "fair_odds": "7.62",
        "best_dec": "11.00",
        "edge": "+4.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Front-runner whose form on AW last year read 221 as opposed to 686 on turf; returns from 192 days off having been gelded and the market should be interesting."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Wetsand",
        "jockey": "Sam James",
        "trainer": "James Owen",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "91",
        "or": "85",
        "form": "1200-7",
        "sire": "Acclamation",
        "dam_sire": "Raven's Pass",
        "stall": 3,
        "weight": "9-9",
        "score": "48.0",
        "model_pct": "8.3%",
        "fair_odds": "12.05",
        "best_dec": "8.50",
        "edge": "-4.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "In good form in her early starts on turf last year, including chasing home Monday's Burradon Stakes winner Timeforshowcasing in a valuable event at Goodwood (7f, good to soft); has found life tougher in warm company since, though, and has enough to prove on AW/handicap debut."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "Just A Girl",
        "jockey": "Callum Shepherd",
        "trainer": "Charlie Johnston",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "88",
        "or": "84",
        "form": "62107-",
        "sire": "Bobby's Kitten",
        "dam_sire": "Oasis Dream",
        "stall": 2,
        "weight": "9-8",
        "score": "46.1",
        "model_pct": "7.0%",
        "fair_odds": "14.33",
        "best_dec": "17.00",
        "edge": "+1.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Bolted up from the front in a Lingfield novice (7.6f, good) last August, but then well held in a York nursery and Newmarket Listed event; closely related to AW winners, but not seen in five months and not quite sure how well handicapped she is."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,
        "horse": "Gold Queen Kindly",
        "jockey": "Pierre-Louis Jamin",
        "trainer": "K R Burke",
        "ts": "79",
        "rpr": "89",
        "or": "84",
        "form": "254-90",
        "sire": "Lope De Vega",
        "dam_sire": "Frankel",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "9-8",
        "score": "41.4",
        "model_pct": "4.5%",
        "fair_odds": "22.05",
        "best_dec": "12.00",
        "edge": "-3.4pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Justified skinny odds on his Pontefract debut (6f, good to firm) last August and ran well on turf afterwards, but having been gelded has been well held in two starts on the AW since returning in January; needs a resurgence over the extra furlong."
      },
      {
        "rank": 8,
        "horse": "Come On Eibhlin",
        "jockey": "Luke Morris",
        "trainer": "Dylan Cunha",
        "ts": "74",
        "rpr": "85",
        "or": "77",
        "form": "10005-",
        "sire": "Space Blues",
        "dam_sire": "Teofilo",
        "stall": 5,
        "weight": "9-1",
        "score": "41.0",
        "model_pct": "4.4%",
        "fair_odds": "22.96",
        "best_dec": "15.00",
        "edge": "-1.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Landed a Windsor novice (6f, good) last summer but faced impossible tasks in most of her other starts; probably found the trip too sharp when fifth of nine on nursery debut here (5f; first-time blinkers) in October, but still has enough to prove back from 163 days off."
      }
    ]
  },

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "February foal; 7,500gns yearling; first foal of a 5f winner (RPR 79), herself a half-sister to a Group 3 winner; likely type on paper; stable 3-26 with their 2yo runners at Bath."
      },
      {

        "edge": "-6.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "April foal; 60,000euros yearling; thirteenth foal; half-brother to seven winners including Balty Boys (6f-1m1f including 2yo/Group 3; RPR 117), Artistic Rifles (7f-1m1f including 2yo/Group 3; 113) and Shore Step (5.7f/6f; 99); dam 6f 2yo winner (76), sister to 6f Group 3 winner Time Prisoner; not obviously a precocious type on paper but trainer won the Brocklesby and this colt must have been showing plenty at home to be starting out so soon."
      },

        "spotlight": "May foal; 1,000gns yearling; fifth foal; half-sister to 1m 2yo winner Storm Alice (RPR 60); dam unplaced 5f-7f (47), half-sister to Abbaye winner Gilt Edge Girl; one of two runners for Adam Kirby."

  {
    "course": "Southwell (AW)",

    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,

        "weight": "9-2",

        "fair_odds": "6.27",
        "best_dec": "3.25",
        "edge": "-16.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Sent off 12-1 when second of six on last month's Chelmsford debut (7f, Polytrack); bred more for sprint trips, but still high on the list if coming on from that first performance."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Back To Me",
        "jockey": "Andrew Mullen",
        "trainer": "Ben Haslam",
        "ts": "37",
        "rpr": "75",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "01-",
        "sire": "Magna Grecia",
        "dam_sire": "Shamardal",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "9-7",
        "score": "59.3",
        "model_pct": "15.0%",
        "fair_odds": "6.65",
        "best_dec": "6.00",
        "edge": "-2.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Improved from his debut when narrowly winning a Dundalk median auction maiden (6f, Polytrack) for Adrian Murray in November; makes his debut for his new stable after five months off having been gelded; has more to do under his penalty, but the market should be revealing."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Blue Mantle",
        "jockey": "Jason Hart",
        "trainer": "Charlie Johnston",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "70",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "3-2",
        "sire": "Iffraaj",
        "dam_sire": "Anabaa",
        "stall": 8,
        "weight": "9-2",
        "score": "59.2",
        "model_pct": "15.0%",
        "fair_odds": "6.68",
        "best_dec": "2.38",
        "edge": "-28.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Fair third of seven on his Hamilton debut (6f, good to firm) last May, but not seen again until beaten a short head on last month's Newcastle return (7f, Tapeta); that race was slowly run but the form still makes him a major player in this."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Receipt",
        "jockey": "Hector Crouch",
        "trainer": "T Ellis",
        "ts": "55",
        "rpr": "74",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "28",
        "sire": "Land Force",
        "dam_sire": "Exceed And Excel",
        "stall": 3,
        "weight": "10-0",
        "score": "55.7",
        "model_pct": "12.4%",
        "fair_odds": "8.06",
        "best_dec": "9.50",
        "edge": "+3.4pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Best effort came in his only start for Pam Sly when second of eight in a similar race over C&D in February, but not so good back with his former trainer at Kempton (1m, Polytrack) 11 days ago; return here may help, but this still looks a tough task against the 3yos."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Jimmy's Army",
        "jockey": "Sam James",
        "trainer": "Grant Tuer",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "-",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "-",
        "sire": "Invincible Army",
        "dam_sire": "Siyouni",
        "stall": 7,
        "weight": "9-0",
        "score": "48.8",
        "model_pct": "8.6%",
        "fair_odds": "11.58",
        "best_dec": "26.00",
        "edge": "+3.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "7,000euros yearling; dam 1m winner (RPR 76), half-sister to useful 1m3f-2m winner Rare Groove, out of French 5.5f 2yo winner; already gelded and stable doesn't have many winning newcomers."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "Vicit Venture",
        "jockey": "Edward Greatrex",
        "trainer": "Charlie Pike",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "-",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "-",
        "sire": "Lope Y Fernandez",
        "dam_sire": "Exceed And Excel",
        "stall": 9,
        "weight": "9-2",
        "score": "48.5",
        "model_pct": "8.5%",
        "fair_odds": "11.74",
        "best_dec": "17.00",
        "edge": "+1.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "20,000euros foal; closely related to 5f/6f 2yo winner Educating Rita (RPR 85); dam placed 5f 2yo (67), half-sister to winners Dutch Kingdom (useful 6f-8.6f) and Seas Of Wells (6f; dam of 1m 2yo Group 2 winner Cadillac); sports plenty of headgear on debut, but stable had a well-backed winning newcomer in a similar contest over C&D in February; well worth a market check."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,
        "horse": "Niffler",
        "jockey": "Luke Morris",
        "trainer": "Sir Mark Prescott Bt",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "-",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "-",
        "sire": "Isfahan",
        "dam_sire": "Dansili",
        "stall": 5,
        "weight": "9-0",
        "score": "48.3",
        "model_pct": "8.4%",
        "fair_odds": "11.91",
        "best_dec": "15.00",
        "edge": "+0.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "8,000euros yearling; brother to German 8.5f winner Lassair, half-brother to German winners Lacento (7.5f/1m) and Lionel (1m1f/1m2f); dam 8.4f winner (RPR 89), closely related to German winners La Saldana (1m Group 3) and La Dawa (Listed-placed 7f 2yo); already gelded; worth a market check, albeit the stable's last two successful newcomers were sent off at 28-1 and 16-1."
      },
      {
        "rank": 8,
        "horse": "You Will See",
        "jockey": "Greg Fairley",

        "ts": "-",

        "edge": "+3.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "26,000gns foal; first foal; dam 1m winner (RPR 84), half-sister to winners Azure Blue (6f Group 2) and Dapper Guest (7f), out of unraced close relative of 1m Group 3 winner Pincheck; has been gelded and undergone wind surgery before this debut; stable not known for winning newcomers."
      },
      {

        "spotlight": "Astronomical prices when out of the frame in both starts over 1m here; second performance was a bit better than the first, but he still looks one for handicaps after this."

  {
    "course": "Bath",

    "going": "Good",
    "class": "Class 1",
    "draw_bias": "low",
    "draw_strength": 2,
    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,
        "horse": "Beautiful Diamond",

        "trainer": "K R Burke",

        "rpr": "117",
        "or": "105",

        "fair_odds": "5.80",
        "best_dec": "3.00",
        "edge": "-13.3pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Her three Listed wins have all come at Ayr, but she is fully effective elsewhere and ran right up to her best when a neck second at Ascot when last seen in October (5f, soft); can go well fresh and she is a leading contender despite her 3lb penalty."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Hold A Dream",
        "jockey": "Rossa Ryan",
        "trainer": "Clive Cox",
        "ts": "99",
        "rpr": "107",
        "or": "99",
        "form": "52932-",
        "sire": "Bated Breath",
        "dam_sire": "Charm Spirit",
        "stall": 9,
        "weight": "9-9",
        "score": "60.1",
        "model_pct": "10.6%",
        "fair_odds": "9.44",
        "best_dec": "5.00",
        "edge": "-6.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Promising 2yo; made a fine return to action last May when second of 12 in a Listed event at Chelmsford (6f); placed at this level on a further three occasions, including when last seen in October; should give another good account for a stable that won this in 2010, 2013 and 2017."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Miss Attitude",
        "jockey": "Rob Hornby",
        "trainer": "Jack Channon",
        "ts": "83",
        "rpr": "117",
        "or": "102",
        "form": "2710-7",
        "sire": "Cityscape",
        "dam_sire": "Exceed And Excel",
        "stall": 12,
        "weight": "9-9",
        "score": "59.1",
        "model_pct": "9.6%",
        "fair_odds": "10.46",
        "best_dec": "5.00",
        "edge": "-8.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Made good progress last summer, notably when beating male opposition in a 5f Listed event at Deauville in August; shaped nicely in a good 5f handicap at Southwell on her return to action two weeks ago; strong claims."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Cindy Lou Who",
        "jockey": "William Carson",
        "trainer": "Tony Carroll",
        "ts": "83",
        "rpr": "95",
        "or": "83",
        "form": "13113-",
        "sire": "Zoustar",
        "dam_sire": "Kodiac",
        "stall": 3,
        "weight": "9-9",
        "score": "58.7",
        "model_pct": "9.2%",
        "fair_odds": "10.85",
        "best_dec": "41.00",
        "edge": "+8.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Three of her four wins last year came at Bath, including over this trip; big step up in class to deal with on this first run since October."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Shine On Me",
        "jockey": "Hollie Doyle",
        "trainer": "Archie Watson",
        "ts": "93",
        "rpr": "100",
        "or": "96",
        "form": "42371-",

        "dam_sire": "Fountain Of Youth",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "8-12",
        "score": "58.2",
        "model_pct": "8.7%",
        "fair_odds": "11.47",
        "best_dec": "8.50",
        "edge": "-4.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Highly tried as a 2yo, placed in Listed/Group 3 company before taking advantage of a straightforward opportunity at Wolverhampton 160 days ago (unimpressive at odds of 1-10); cheekpieces return for her seasonal debut."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "Temple Of Athena",
        "jockey": "Ben Robinson",
        "trainer": "Brian Ellison",
        "ts": "89",
        "rpr": "102",
        "or": "89",
        "form": "5163-1",
        "sire": "Magna Grecia",
        "dam_sire": "Dansili",
        "stall": 5,
        "weight": "8-12",
        "score": "57.6",
        "model_pct": "8.2%",
        "fair_odds": "12.22",
        "best_dec": "13.00",
        "edge": "-0.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Two turf wins (good to soft and soft) as a 2yo; better than ever when winning a Class 4 handicap at Wolverhampton (5f) 19 days ago; much more required in today's field."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,
        "horse": "Ruby's Profit",
        "jockey": "Billy Loughnane",
        "trainer": "Dr Richard Newland & Jamie Insole",
        "ts": "96",
        "rpr": "102",
        "or": "89",
        "form": "73054-",
        "sire": "Profitable",
        "dam_sire": "Acclamation",
        "stall": 8,
        "weight": "9-9",
        "score": "57.3",
        "model_pct": "8.0%",
        "fair_odds": "12.55",
        "best_dec": "17.00",
        "edge": "+1.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Speedy filly who won twice last year and regularly acquitted herself with credit in good handicaps; could yet make up into a black type performer but this won't be an easy race in which to try and dominate."
      },
      {
        "rank": 8,
        "horse": "Arugam Bay",
        "jockey": "Chris Hayes",
        "trainer": "Eddie & Patrick Harty",
        "ts": "90",
        "rpr": "99",
        "or": "93",
        "form": "21167-",
        "sire": "Soldier's Call",
        "dam_sire": "Dandy Man",
        "stall": 2,
        "weight": "8-12",
        "score": "56.0",
        "model_pct": "7.0%",
        "fair_odds": "14.33",
        "best_dec": "15.00",
        "edge": "+0.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Made all to win a small-field Listed event at Tipperary last July (5f, good; unpenalised); two defeats afterwards came over 6f in Group 3 company; dropping back to 5f won't be a problem; not discounted."
      },
      {
        "rank": 9,
        "horse": "Azure Angel",
        "jockey": "Kieran Shoemark",
        "trainer": "Edward Bethell",
        "ts": "87",
        "rpr": "102",
        "or": "92",
        "form": "3881-6",
        "sire": "Harry Angel",
        "dam_sire": "Zoffany",
        "stall": 11,
        "weight": "9-9",
        "score": "52.9",
        "model_pct": "5.1%",
        "fair_odds": "19.77",
        "best_dec": "21.00",
        "edge": "+2.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Back to something approaching her best when winning a 14-runner handicap at Southwell last September (blinkered first time); may have needed the run back at Southwell last month (first run for 164 days); she'll do well to win but a minor placing isn't out of the question."
      },
      {
        "rank": 10,
        "horse": "Flowerhead",
        "jockey": "David Egan",
        "trainer": "Charlie Clover",
        "ts": "93",
        "rpr": "104",
        "or": "95",
        "form": "25387-",
        "sire": "Starman",
        "dam_sire": "Champs Elysees",
        "stall": 14,
        "weight": "8-12",
        "score": "51.0",
        "model_pct": "4.2%",
        "fair_odds": "23.93",
        "best_dec": "12.00",
        "edge": "-3.4pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won a Chepstow maiden on her second start; big step forward when second of 23 in the Group 2 Queen Mary at Royal Ascot 11 days later; no progress afterwards but today's return to 5f should be in her favour."
      },
      {
        "rank": 11,
        "horse": "Arduis Invicta",
        "jockey": "David Probert",
        "trainer": "Craig Lidster",
        "ts": "79",
        "rpr": "94",
        "or": "83",
        "form": "81366-",

        "dam_sire": "First Defence",
        "stall": 10,
        "weight": "8-12",
        "score": "50.6",
        "model_pct": "4.0%",
        "fair_odds": "25.00",
        "best_dec": "29.00",
        "edge": "+1.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Two 5f wins last year; seemed to excel herself in Listed company at Ayr in September and Redcar one month later; even those efforts need leaving well behind if she is to take this."
      },
      {
        "rank": 12,
        "horse": "Angel Shared",
        "jockey": "Dougie Costello",
        "trainer": "Steph Hollinshead",
        "ts": "89",
        "rpr": "94",
        "or": "84",

        "best_dec": "51.00",
        "edge": "+3.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Tough front-running handicapper but nothing in her form to think she was the answer to today's puzzle."
      },
      {
        "rank": 13,
        "horse": "Palmeira",
        "jockey": "Charles Bishop",
        "trainer": "Eve Johnson Houghton",
        "ts": "90",
        "rpr": "96",
        "or": "84",
        "form": "27603-",
        "sire": "Havana Grey",
        "dam_sire": "Ivawood",
        "stall": 7,
        "weight": "8-12",
        "score": "45.7",
        "model_pct": "2.4%",
        "fair_odds": "40.95",
        "best_dec": "34.00",
        "edge": "+1.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Failed to win in her ten 2yo starts but she was often highly tried, running her best race when second of 11 in a Listed event at Newbury (5f, good); looks to face another stiff task on her reappearance."
      },
      {
        "rank": 14,
        "horse": "Billie Be Quick",

        "best_dec": "34.00",
        "edge": "+1.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Hold-up performer who advanced her form with her sixth to Beautiful Diamond in an Ayr Listed event last September (blinkered first time); over 4l to find with that rival though and she looks up against it; cheekpieces the headgear of choice today."
      }
    ]
  },

  {
    "course": "Southwell (AW)",
    "time": "15:41",
    "race_name": "Ladies Day Sunday 16th August Fillies' Handicap",
    "type": "flat",
    "surface": "AW",
    "dist": "1m",
    "going": "Standard",
    "class": "Class 4",
    "draw_bias": "none",
    "draw_strength": 2,
    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,
        "horse": "Pendella",
        "jockey": "Sam James",
        "trainer": "K R Burke",
        "ts": "56",
        "rpr": "85",
        "or": "78",
        "form": "2-41",
        "sire": "Space Blues",
        "dam_sire": "Marju",
        "stall": 6,
        "weight": "8-13",
        "score": "62.2",
        "model_pct": "34.0%",
        "fair_odds": "2.94",
        "best_dec": "2.63",
        "edge": "-17.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Only made her debut in December and got off the mark when beating City Queen by just under 2l (pair clear) in a Wolverhampton maiden (8.6f, Tapeta) in February; only 1lb worse off and makes plenty of appeal, especially with the possibility of more improvement to come."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Song N Dance",
        "jockey": "Daniel Tudhope",
        "trainer": "S Woods",
        "ts": "53",
        "rpr": "83",
        "or": "82",
        "form": "36211-",
        "sire": "Bated Breath",
        "dam_sire": "Poet's Voice",
        "stall": 3,
        "weight": "10-4",
        "score": "56.6",
        "model_pct": "19.3%",
        "fair_odds": "5.19",
        "best_dec": "5.50",
        "edge": "+1.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Unexposed for a 4yo after just six starts and she ended last season on a high with wins in a Leicester novice (7f, good) and a Newcastle handicap (1m, Tapeta); now 7lb higher and is the only one in the field without a run this year."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "City Queen",
        "jockey": "Toby Moore(7)",
        "trainer": "Charlie Appleby",
        "ts": "53",
        "rpr": "86",
        "or": "77",
        "form": "5-22",
        "sire": "Dubawi",
        "dam_sire": "Nathaniel",
        "stall": 2,
        "weight": "8-12",
        "score": "56.6",
        "model_pct": "19.2%",
        "fair_odds": "5.20",
        "best_dec": "4.00",
        "edge": "-4.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Runner-up in both starts since returning in February, firstly behind Pendella at Wolverhampton (8.6f, Tapeta) in February and then behind a nice newcomer over this C&D last month; ought to be bang there once again."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Selection",
        "jockey": "Jason Hart",
        "trainer": "Ivan Furtado",
        "ts": "66",
        "rpr": "82",
        "or": "77",
        "form": "34-522",
        "sire": "Cotai Glory",
        "dam_sire": "Aqlaam",
        "stall": 5,
        "weight": "9-13",
        "score": "53.8",
        "model_pct": "14.4%",
        "fair_odds": "6.94",
        "best_dec": "5.50",
        "edge": "-4.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Has proved consistent in AW handicaps (1534522) and was only beaten a neck in first-time cheekpieces at Newcastle (1m, Tapeta) 15 days ago; another 2lb rise not the end of the world, but she is up against some less-exposed types."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Likeness",
        "jockey": "Jack Callan(5)",
        "trainer": "George Boughey",
        "ts": "54",
        "rpr": "84",
        "or": "76",
        "form": "3622-4",
        "sire": "Blue Point",
        "dam_sire": "Kingman",
        "stall": 1,
        "weight": "8-11",
        "score": "48.2",
        "model_pct": "8.2%",
        "fair_odds": "12.18",
        "best_dec": "8.00",
        "edge": "-4.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Runner-up in two small-field nurseries at Newcastle (1m, Tapeta) in the autumn; fair fourth of ten on last month's Chelmsford return (7f, Polytrack), but more will be needed if she is to win this."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "Kiss Me My Love",
        "jockey": "Joanna Mason",
        "trainer": "Roger Fell",
        "ts": "53",
        "rpr": "84",
        "or": "62",
        "form": "0615-0",
        "sire": "Invincible Spirit",
        "dam_sire": "Kitten's Joy",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "8-12",
        "score": "43.1",
        "model_pct": "4.9%",
        "fair_odds": "20.45",
        "best_dec": "51.00",
        "edge": "+3.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "2-18, so much the most exposed in the field and she failed to beat a rival on her Wolverhampton return (8.6f, Tapeta) 16 days ago; down the list."
      }
    ]
  },
  {

        "spotlight": "Two wins last season, including here (5.7f, firm); 6lb higher than for the second of them and he will need to be at his best on his return from eight months off."

      {
        "rank": 2,

        "fair_odds": "8.51",
        "best_dec": "10.00",
        "edge": "+3.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Course winner (5.7f) off this mark last August; low-key return to action at Wolverhampton last month; the booking of Billy Loughnane points to a better showing today."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Twilight Madness",

        "edge": "-6.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Front-runner; two wins in December and in the money on his last three starts; just 1-15 on turf as opposed to 8-37 on AW; others appeal more for win purposes."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,

        "ts": "65",

        "fair_odds": "11.02",
        "best_dec": "15.00",
        "edge": "+4.4pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won three times in the second half of 2025, including at this track (5.7f); looks high enough in the weights on his return from a five-month absence."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Level Up",
        "jockey": "Laura Coughlan(3)",
        "trainer": "David Evans",
        "ts": "76",
        "rpr": "77",
        "or": "60",
        "form": "7-3454",

        "dam_sire": "Storm Cat",
        "stall": 9,
        "weight": "9-4",
        "score": "46.6",
        "model_pct": "7.3%",
        "fair_odds": "13.63",
        "best_dec": "7.50",
        "edge": "-5.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Acquitted himself with credit in the face of a tough task at Lingfield last month; back down in class today and 4lb lower than for his latest win (October); one to consider."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "Call Time",
        "jockey": "David Probert",
        "trainer": "J S Moore",
        "ts": "72",
        "rpr": "73",
        "or": "56",
        "form": "34635-",

        "dam_sire": "Iffraaj",
        "stall": 11,

        "score": "44.8",
        "model_pct": "6.1%",
        "fair_odds": "16.46",
        "best_dec": "8.00",
        "edge": "-4.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Both wins on soft ground, including C&D; effective on a faster surface too but fully exposed and may come on for this first run since November."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,
        "horse": "The Feminine Urge",
        "jockey": "Rossa Ryan",
        "trainer": "Grace Harris",
        "ts": "66",
        "rpr": "75",
        "or": "65",

        "dam_sire": "Invincible Spirit",
        "stall": 13,
        "weight": "9-9",
        "score": "44.0",
        "model_pct": "5.6%",
        "fair_odds": "17.91",
        "best_dec": "21.00",
        "edge": "+2.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won three times for George Scott, including two 5f handicaps off similar marks last year; sold for 2,000gns in October; absent for 208 days but Rossa Ryan is booked and his record for the stable (15-102 for a level-stake profit of 48.25pts) offers hope she will be ready to roll."
      },
      {
        "rank": 8,
        "horse": "So Smart",
        "jockey": "Kieran O'Neill",
        "trainer": "Grace Harris",
        "ts": "72",
        "rpr": "73",
        "or": "64",
        "form": "34827-",

        "dam_sire": "Majestic Missile",
        "stall": 5,
        "weight": "9-8",
        "score": "44.0",
        "model_pct": "5.6%",
        "fair_odds": "17.93",
        "best_dec": "15.00",
        "edge": "+0.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "C&D winner; two 5f wins on turf last summer; on his last winning mark but he was disappointing when last seen and his record fresh suggests this may not be his day."
      },
      {
        "rank": 9,

        "rpr": "74",

        "fair_odds": "18.72",

        "edge": "-1.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Just one win from his 18 starts but that came off a 2lb higher mark last summer; raced freely on his return to action 16 days ago and dropped away in the straight; likely to last longer today."
      },

      },
      {

        "spotlight": "Six-race maiden; two runs for Tony Carroll last month saw him finish unplaced but the first of them wasn't without hope; down in weights and appeals as the type to come good at some point soon; drops to 5f for the first time; market support would look significant."
      },

        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Came from off the pace to win a Thirsk handicap (6f, good to firm) last August off a 1lb higher mark; mixed bag since but dropping back into Class 6 company will be in his favour."
      },
      {
        "rank": 13,

      }

  {
    "course": "Southwell (AW)",
    "time": "16:15",
    "race_name": "Country & Western Night 25th April Handicap",
    "type": "flat",
    "surface": "AW",
    "dist": "1m",
    "going": "Standard",
    "class": "Class 5",
    "draw_bias": "none",
    "draw_strength": 2,
    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,
        "horse": "Marry The Night",
        "jockey": "Sean Kirrane",
        "trainer": "Tim Easterby",
        "ts": "51",
        "rpr": "81",
        "or": "70",
        "form": "-15113",
        "sire": "Advertise",
        "dam_sire": "Bated Breath",
        "stall": 3,
        "weight": "9-9",
        "score": "61.1",
        "model_pct": "28.7%",
        "fair_odds": "3.48",
        "best_dec": "4.00",
        "edge": "-4.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Ran perfectly well when third of 11 behind a subsequent winner at Wolverhampton (8.6f, Tapeta) 16 days ago, but should relish the return here with his record over C&D reading 2211511; high on list."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Holly Mist",
        "jockey": "Callum Rodriguez",
        "trainer": "Roger Varian",
        "ts": "55",
        "rpr": "79",
        "or": "69",
        "form": "3-23",
        "sire": "Dark Angel",
        "dam_sire": "Sepoy",
        "stall": 2,
        "weight": "9-8",
        "score": "56.0",
        "model_pct": "18.3%",
        "fair_odds": "5.47",
        "best_dec": "3.00",
        "edge": "-13.3pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Placed in all three starts, though a slowly run race may not have suited her when third of five at Kempton (7f, Polytrack; 5-4) last time; up a furlong for her handicap debut which should be within range, but she is minus a hood for the first time."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Union Island",
        "jockey": "Sean D Bowen",
        "trainer": "Charlie Johnston",
        "ts": "62",
        "rpr": "79",
        "or": "65",
        "form": "8-6314",
        "sire": "U S Navy Flag",
        "dam_sire": "Giant's Causeway",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "9-4",
        "score": "53.7",
        "model_pct": "14.9%",
        "fair_odds": "6.72",
        "best_dec": "12.00",
        "edge": "+5.6pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Was back off his last winning mark when narrowly successful in first-time cheekpieces at Lingfield (1m, Polytrack) in February, but finished behind Dream Illusion when fourth of eight at Newcastle (1m, Tapeta) ten days later; acts here, but still needs a bit more."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Dream Illusion",
        "jockey": "William Pyle(3)",
        "trainer": "Michael Herrington",
        "ts": "67",
        "rpr": "82",
        "or": "68",
        "form": "112218",
        "sire": "Oasis Dream",
        "dam_sire": "Royal Applause",
        "stall": 6,
        "weight": "9-7",
        "score": "51.7",
        "model_pct": "12.5%",
        "fair_odds": "8.01",
        "best_dec": "8.50",
        "edge": "+2.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Proved a disappointing favourite after having got worked up in the stalls at Newcastle (1m, Tapeta) nine days ago, but she is 2-2 over this C&D and just 2lb above her last winning mark; a player if bouncing back."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Soames Forsyte",
        "jockey": "Dylan Hogan",
        "trainer": "Michael Herrington",
        "ts": "66",
        "rpr": "81",
        "or": "67",
        "form": "7-8184",
        "sire": "Siyouni",
        "dam_sire": "Teofilo",
        "stall": 5,
        "weight": "9-6",
        "score": "48.9",
        "model_pct": "9.8%",
        "fair_odds": "10.25",
        "best_dec": "10.00",
        "edge": "+1.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Has become inconsistent but has won four times here, the latest over this trip in January; just 1lb higher and a player if on a going day."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "American State",
        "jockey": "Stevie Donohoe",
        "trainer": "Ivan Furtado",
        "ts": "59",
        "rpr": "80",
        "or": "68",
        "form": "887-16",
        "sire": "Arizona",
        "dam_sire": "War Command",
        "stall": 7,
        "weight": "9-7",
        "score": "45.5",
        "model_pct": "7.1%",
        "fair_odds": "13.98",
        "best_dec": "5.00",
        "edge": "-12.4pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Returned from wind surgery with a success at Wolverhampton (8.6f, Tapeta) in February, but had excuses when only sixth of 11 there last month (wide draw/slow pace); has finished out of the frame in three visits here, though."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,
        "horse": "Looks Fantastic",
        "jockey": "Robert Havlin",
        "trainer": "Michael Appleby",
        "ts": "50",
        "rpr": "79",
        "or": "62",
        "form": "39507-",
        "sire": "Kameko",
        "dam_sire": "Tertullian",
        "stall": 8,
        "weight": "9-1",
        "score": "40.2",
        "model_pct": "4.5%",
        "fair_odds": "22.29",
        "best_dec": "19.00",
        "edge": "-0.3pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "0-9; best effort when second of 12 in a maiden over C&D for Ed Bethell a year ago, but has regressed since including in three starts for this yard; needs to have derived benefit from a 107-day absence."
      },
      {
        "rank": 8,
        "horse": "Hachiman",
        "jockey": "James Sullivan",
        "trainer": "Ruth Carr",
        "ts": "54",
        "rpr": "77",
        "or": "65",
        "form": "167-79",
        "sire": "Frankel",
        "dam_sire": "Dark Angel",
        "stall": 1,
        "weight": "9-4",
        "score": "39.5",
        "model_pct": "4.2%",
        "fair_odds": "23.68",
        "best_dec": "51.00",
        "edge": "+3.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won a Lingfield maiden (1m, Polytrack) for the Crisfords last autumn, but well held in all four handicaps including two for this yard; best watched."
      }
    ]
  },
  {
    "course": "Bath",
    "time": "16:20",
    "race_name": "Droneart Show May 8th & 9th Restricted Novice Stakes (Bands B, C and D) (GBB Race)",
    "type": "flat",
    "surface": "Turf",
    "dist": "1m2f",
    "going": "Good",
    "class": "Class 4",
    "draw_bias": "none",
    "draw_strength": 2,
    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,
        "horse": "Colourband",
        "jockey": "Harry Davies",
        "trainer": "Simon & Ed Crisford",
        "ts": "67",
        "rpr": "86",
        "or": "82",
        "form": "732-",
        "sire": "Iffraaj",
        "dam_sire": "Dubawi",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "8-11",
        "score": "58.5",
        "model_pct": "23.1%",
        "fair_odds": "4.34",
        "best_dec": "2.50",
        "edge": "-19.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Third of 11 in a novice at Salisbury (1m, good) in October on second start; gelded before he improved again when second of ten to a good prospect at Kempton (1m, AW) in December, which gives him the best form in this line-up; major claims, although 1m2f is not absolutely certain to suit and he's tended to hang right on his last two starts."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Baltic Fleet",
        "jockey": "Billy Loughnane",
        "trainer": "George Boughey",
        "ts": "77",
        "rpr": "78",
        "or": "80",
        "form": "51-",
        "sire": "Space Blues",
        "dam_sire": "Sea The Stars",
        "stall": 5,
        "weight": "9-4",
        "score": "56.0",
        "model_pct": "20.1%",
        "fair_odds": "4.97",
        "best_dec": "2.00",
        "edge": "-29.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "75,000euros (breeze-up) 2yo; promise at Windsor (1m, soft) before his always-prominent, short-head win in a Yarmouth maiden (1m1f, good to soft) later in September; should stay; one of the two who dominate calculations."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Chilli King",
        "jockey": "David Probert",
        "trainer": "Emma Lavelle",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "-",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "-",
        "sire": "Golden Horn",
        "dam_sire": "Sir Percy",
        "stall": 3,
        "weight": "8-9",
        "score": "50.3",
        "model_pct": "14.6%",
        "fair_odds": "6.84",
        "best_dec": "13.00",
        "edge": "+6.3pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Sixth foal; Golden Horn half-brother to winners Hariboux (7f-1m1f including 2yo/AW/US stakes; RPR 97), Chilli Queen (1m4f; 92) and Tara Iti (1m 2yo Flat, 66; 2m/2m1f hurdle); dam 1m2f turf and 1m4f AW winner (88), sister to 1m4f/2m winner; worth a market check on debut."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Cape Fear",
        "jockey": "Rob Hornby",
        "trainer": "Andrew Balding",
        "ts": "19",
        "rpr": "58",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "5-",
        "sire": "Kameko",
        "dam_sire": "Cape Cross",
        "stall": 2,
        "weight": "8-11",
        "score": "45.1",
        "model_pct": "10.9%",
        "fair_odds": "9.16",
        "best_dec": "8.50",
        "edge": "+2.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Closely related to bumper winner Topkapi, half-brother to 11.4f winner City Spirit (RPR 70); dam placed at 1m-1m6f (61); 16-1, slow-starting fifth of seven in novice at Brighton (1m, good to firm) in October, which he will surely improve on but two of today's rivals have shown much more."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Baron Wagstaff",
        "jockey": "Kieran O'Neill",
        "trainer": "Richard Phillips",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "64",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "4",
        "sire": "Ulysses",
        "dam_sire": "Theatrical",
        "stall": 7,
        "weight": "8-7",
        "score": "41.8",
        "model_pct": "9.1%",
        "fair_odds": "10.99",
        "best_dec": "21.00",
        "edge": "+6.3pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Has a pretty useful pedigree and showed some ability at Kempton (1m, AW; 200-1) early last month, but others have more pressing claims."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "Master Jorrocks",
        "jockey": "Dougie Costello",
        "trainer": "Samuel Drinkwater",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "-",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "-",
        "sire": "Cityscape",
        "dam_sire": "Invincible Spirit",
        "stall": 1,
        "weight": "10-0",
        "score": "41.1",
        "model_pct": "8.8%",
        "fair_odds": "11.41",
        "best_dec": "67.00",
        "edge": "+6.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Sixth foal; Cityscape half-brother to 5f winner Therehegoes (RPR 64); dam fourth at 5f on AW (47), closely related to 1m winner Sheriff, out of 6f-winning half-sister to 6f Listed winner Mugharreb; 7-1, tailed off in a 2m point-to-point bumper five week ago; best watched."
      },
      {

        "stall": 6,

  {
    "course": "Southwell (AW)",
    "time": "16:50",
    "race_name": "Book The Bistro In Seasons Restaurant Restricted Novice Stakes (Bands C and D) (GBB Race)",
    "type": "flat",
    "surface": "AW",
    "dist": "1m4f",
    "going": "Standard",
    "class": "Class 4",
    "draw_bias": "none",
    "draw_strength": 2,
    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,
        "horse": "Desert Belle",
        "jockey": "Luke Morris",
        "trainer": "Sir Mark Prescott Bt",
        "ts": "55",
        "rpr": "74",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "2",
        "sire": "Masar",
        "dam_sire": "Shamardal",
        "stall": 7,
        "weight": "8-2",
        "score": "58.1",
        "model_pct": "23.0%",
        "fair_odds": "4.35",
        "best_dec": "2.25",
        "edge": "-24.4pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Well related, including as close relation to 1m-1m2f winner Dubai Icon (including AW; RPR 111); 10-11 for maiden at Lingfield (1m, AW) 16 days ago, looking sluggish at most stages but she ran on into second of eight; handed an extra 4f today and she's a leading player on form and potential."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Pure Moon",
        "jockey": "Edward Greatrex",
        "trainer": "Tom Clover",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "72",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "2-",
        "sire": "Sea The Moon",
        "dam_sire": "Zamindar",
        "stall": 2,
        "weight": "8-9",
        "score": "54.1",
        "model_pct": "17.6%",
        "fair_odds": "5.68",
        "best_dec": "3.25",
        "edge": "-10.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "35,000gns yearling by Sea The Moon; 18-1 and slowly into stride for novice at Nottingham (1m, heavy) last October but he gradually worked his way forward to emerge in second of 12; swiftly raised to 1m4f and brings clear potential, so he looks a leading contender."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "John Galt",
        "jockey": "Saffie Osborne",
        "trainer": "Jamie Osborne",
        "ts": "58",
        "rpr": "72",
        "or": "67",
        "form": "4-445",
        "sire": "Elvstroem",
        "dam_sire": "Sea The Stars",
        "stall": 3,
        "weight": "10-0",
        "score": "48.1",
        "model_pct": "11.7%",
        "fair_odds": "8.53",
        "best_dec": "6.00",
        "edge": "-2.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Made debut in only December and ability on all four starts, best form when fifth of ten on handicap debut at Wolverhampton (1m4f) last time; tongue-tie and cheekpieces are now enlisted; form chance but probably vulnerable."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Joyful Lawyer",
        "jockey": "Pierre-Louis Jamin",
        "trainer": "K R Burke",
        "ts": "20",
        "rpr": "65",
        "or": "68",
        "form": "97-4",
        "sire": "Kitten's Joy",
        "dam_sire": "Blame",
        "stall": 9,
        "weight": "8-9",
        "score": "46.1",
        "model_pct": "10.3%",
        "fair_odds": "9.72",
        "best_dec": "7.50",
        "edge": "+0.6pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Well held in two starts on Tapeta late last year; gelded and first-time headgear when showing more for fourth of six from the front in a maiden at Chelmsford (1m2f, Polytrack) four weeks ago; needs to build on that."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Poppeye",
        "jockey": "Oliver Stammers",
        "trainer": "Grant Tuer",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "-",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "-",
        "sire": "Expert Eye",
        "dam_sire": "Trade Fair",
        "stall": 6,
        "weight": "10-0",
        "score": "46.1",
        "model_pct": "10.2%",
        "fair_odds": "9.75",
        "best_dec": "34.00",
        "edge": "+11.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Sixth foal; Expert Eye half-brother to winners Real Terms (1m2f-1m4f including AW; RPR 86) and Termonator (6f/1m AW; 68); dam 9.7f-1m4f winner (100) out of unraced half-sister to Irish St Leger winner Sans Frontieres; it would be a bit surprising if debut is his day."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "Havana's Tune",
        "jockey": "Marco Ghiani",
        "trainer": "Marco Botti",
        "ts": "23",
        "rpr": "48",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "96",
        "sire": "Havana Gold",
        "dam_sire": "Fastnet Rock",
        "stall": 1,
        "weight": "8-7",
        "score": "44.0",
        "model_pct": "8.9%",
        "fair_odds": "11.18",
        "best_dec": "34.00",
        "edge": "+4.6pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Never dangerous when beaten 16l or so at Southwell (1m) and Kempton (1m4f) this year; wore cheekpieces both starts, plus tongue-tie on latest; now tries blinkers; no form claims yet."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,
        "horse": "Mystic Music",
        "jockey": "Nicola Currie",
        "trainer": "Andrew Balding",
        "ts": "13",
        "rpr": "30",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "5",
        "sire": "Waldgeist",
        "dam_sire": "Acclamation",
        "stall": 8,
        "weight": "8-2",
        "score": "39.6",
        "model_pct": "6.7%",
        "fair_odds": "15.05",
        "best_dec": "17.00",
        "edge": "+1.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "33-1 in a maiden at Chelmsford (1m, AW) last month and beaten 20l; at least her sire and siblings suggest this will be more her trip."
      },
      {
        "rank": 8,
        "horse": "The Lakes",
        "jockey": "Cam Hardie",
        "trainer": "Simon Whitaker",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "7",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "6",
        "sire": "Advertise",
        "dam_sire": "Captain Rio",
        "stall": 5,
        "weight": "9-11",
        "score": "37.9",
        "model_pct": "5.9%",
        "fair_odds": "16.86",
        "best_dec": "201.00",
        "edge": "+7.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Big prices, soundly beaten in her three bumpers and a C&D novice."
      },
      {
        "rank": 9,
        "horse": "Here Comes Louie",
        "jockey": "James Sullivan",
        "trainer": "Roger Fell",
        "ts": "10",
        "rpr": "37",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "90-",
        "sire": "Land Force",
        "dam_sire": "Rock Of Gibraltar",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "8-7",
        "score": "37.1",
        "model_pct": "5.6%",

        "best_dec": "101.00",
        "edge": "+6.6pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "66-1 when well beaten in a novice at Redcar (1m, good) in October and 80-1 when even further adrift in a maiden here (1m, AW) one week later; pedigree is not a strong pointer to this trip."
      }
    ]
  },
  {
    "course": "Bath",
    "time": "16:55",
    "race_name": "R.J. King & Sons Handicap",
    "type": "flat",
    "surface": "Turf",
    "dist": "1m",
    "going": "Good",
    "class": "Class 5",
    "draw_bias": "none",
    "draw_strength": 2,
    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,
        "horse": "Law Supreme",
        "jockey": "Billy Loughnane",
        "trainer": "Ian Williams",
        "ts": "46",
        "rpr": "91",
        "or": "67",
        "form": "-74112",
        "sire": "Lawman",
        "dam_sire": "Lope De Vega",
        "stall": 6,
        "weight": "9-2",
        "score": "58.2",
        "model_pct": "22.6%",
        "fair_odds": "4.42",
        "best_dec": "5.00",
        "edge": "+0.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Unraced on firmer than good; 3-7 since cheekpieces went on, with all those wins over 9.4f on the Wolverhampton Tapeta; good second, however, over 1m at Newcastle (AW) nine days ago; major player if that form is transferred to turf and he was fully effective (C&D winner) on turf in 2024."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "The Dark Baron",
        "jockey": "Laura Coughlan(3)",
        "trainer": "Kathy Turner",
        "ts": "65",
        "rpr": "85",
        "or": "64",
        "form": "32-321",
        "sire": "Dark Angel",
        "dam_sire": "Declaration Of War",
        "stall": 10,
        "weight": "8-13",
        "score": "55.5",
        "model_pct": "16.8%",
        "fair_odds": "5.94",
        "best_dec": "8.00",
        "edge": "+1.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Most consistent since switched to the AW in October (1332321; most under Laura Coughlan) with the wins at Wolverhampton over 9.4f and 7f; creeping up the weights and although he had a 1m2f turf win last September, there is something for him to prove in this discipline."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Little Miss India",
        "jockey": "Ashley Lewis(5)",
        "trainer": "James Owen",
        "ts": "53",
        "rpr": "86",
        "or": "71",
        "form": "-72141",
        "sire": "Invincible Spirit",
        "dam_sire": "Galileo",
        "stall": 8,
        "weight": "9-6",
        "score": "52.1",
        "model_pct": "11.6%",
        "fair_odds": "8.63",
        "best_dec": "5.50",
        "edge": "-4.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "3-9 since a hood went on, including wins under Ashley Lewis at Wolverhampton (1m4f and 9.4f) on two of her last three starts; unraced over a trip this short since her pre-handicap days and the hood is removed; also unraced on turf since last July and none of her turf form matches this mark."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Tribal Rhythm",
        "jockey": "Rossa Ryan",
        "trainer": "Denis Coakley",
        "ts": "75",
        "rpr": "89",
        "or": "74",
        "form": "17060-",
        "sire": "Ulysses",
        "dam_sire": "Archipenko",
        "stall": 2,
        "weight": "9-9",
        "score": "50.6",
        "model_pct": "9.8%",
        "fair_odds": "10.24",
        "best_dec": "4.00",
        "edge": "-13.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Returned from seven months off to win from off the pace at Epsom (8.5f, good) last April; now bids to do much the same, after four lesser shows last season, and he's back to that last winning mark."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "The Hare Rail",
        "jockey": "George Wood",
        "trainer": "Roger Teal",
        "ts": "64",
        "rpr": "87",
        "or": "71",
        "form": "2834-5",
        "sire": "Dark Angel",
        "dam_sire": "Verglas",
        "stall": 5,
        "weight": "9-6",
        "score": "49.5",
        "model_pct": "8.7%",
        "fair_odds": "11.48",
        "best_dec": "9.50",
        "edge": "-2.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Yet to win after 14 starts but has managed four seconds and is often thereabouts; place hopes with a recent run under his belt."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "Darvel",
        "jockey": "David Probert",
        "trainer": "Patrick Chamings",
        "ts": "72",
        "rpr": "83",
        "or": "74",
        "form": "31137-",
        "sire": "Dark Angel",
        "dam_sire": "Starspangledbanner",
        "stall": 1,
        "weight": "9-9",
        "score": "48.1",
        "model_pct": "7.4%",
        "fair_odds": "13.47",
        "best_dec": "15.00",
        "edge": "+0.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Two of his eight wins have been over C&D and they were first time out in April 2024 and April 2025; two wins last summer ensure that he remains much higher in the weights but that reappearance record here is striking."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,
        "horse": "In The Post",
        "jockey": "David Egan",
        "trainer": "Dylan Cunha",
        "ts": "68",
        "rpr": "81",
        "or": "68",
        "form": "3237-",
        "sire": "Postponed",
        "dam_sire": "Singspiel",
        "stall": 3,
        "weight": "9-3",
        "score": "46.3",
        "model_pct": "6.1%",
        "fair_odds": "16.37",
        "best_dec": "12.00",
        "edge": "-0.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "1m2f seemed to stretch him when he was seventh of 13 here on handicap debut last September; peak form was at 1m the time before; overall improvement is needed but he's had only four races, so could still have potential."
      },
      {
        "rank": 8,
        "horse": "Dark Rosa",
        "jockey": "Rob Hornby",
        "trainer": "Georgina Nicholls",
        "ts": "74",
        "rpr": "83",
        "or": "73",
        "form": "4517-5",
        "sire": "Dark Angel",
        "dam_sire": "Diamond Green",
        "stall": 7,
        "weight": "9-8",
        "score": "45.6",
        "model_pct": "5.7%",
        "fair_odds": "17.68",
        "best_dec": "8.50",
        "edge": "-4.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Shot back up the weights after an easy win at Wolverhampton (8.6f, AW) in November; had comparable form over 6f on turf last season and finished on heels of the leaders in 1m2f AW race in January on latest start, but others may well be a bit better handicapped."
      },
      {
        "rank": 9,
        "horse": "Crimson Road",
        "jockey": "Charles Bishop",
        "trainer": "John & Rhys Flint",
        "ts": "75",
        "rpr": "84",
        "or": "65",
        "form": "88757-",
        "sire": "Masar",
        "dam_sire": "Mastercraftsman",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "9-0",
        "score": "42.4",
        "model_pct": "4.0%",
        "fair_odds": "25.16",
        "best_dec": "41.00",
        "edge": "+2.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Dual Flat winner over 1m2f on good to firm in 2024 but no impact in 2025; didn't really take to hurdling and left Susan Corbett for \u00a35,000 in December; hood and tongue-tie are removed on this debut for new yard."
      },
      {
        "rank": 10,
        "horse": "Risen Again",
        "jockey": "William Carson",
        "trainer": "John & Rhys Flint",
        "ts": "81",
        "rpr": "85",
        "or": "68",
        "form": "8226-0",
        "sire": "No Nay Never",
        "dam_sire": "Galileo",
        "stall": 11,
        "weight": "9-3",
        "score": "42.0",
        "model_pct": "3.8%",
        "fair_odds": "26.24",
        "best_dec": "29.00",
        "edge": "+1.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Sole win (21 races) was over 1m2f at Yarmouth last May but subsequent efforts include two seconds; left Alice Haynes for 17,000gns in October and came last of 12 (hood removed) when upped to 1m5f for new yard in February; now has a bit to prove over a trip this short."
      },
      {
        "rank": 11,
        "horse": "Look Back Smiling",
        "jockey": "Dougie Costello",
        "trainer": "Neil Mulholland",
        "ts": "91",
        "rpr": "88",
        "or": "68",
        "form": "57069-",
        "sire": "Fast Company",
        "dam_sire": "Pivotal",
        "stall": 9,
        "weight": "9-3",
        "score": "41.3",
        "model_pct": "3.5%",
        "fair_odds": "28.34",
        "best_dec": "19.00",
        "edge": "-0.3pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Usually slowly away; lost his form last autumn but he's thrown in judged on plenty of earlier 2025 form, never mind peak efforts; first run since he left Gemma Tutty for 9,000gns in December and the market may guide."
      }
    ]
  },
