  {
    "course": "Southwell (AW)",
    "time": "17:20",
    "race_name": "Celebrate With Sponsorship At Southwell Racecourse Handicap",
    "type": "flat",
    "surface": "AW",
    "dist": "1m4f",
    "going": "Standard",
    "class": "Class 6",
    "draw_bias": "none",
    "draw_strength": 2,
    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,
        "horse": "Jack Andrea",
        "jockey": "Hector Crouch",
        "trainer": "John Butler",
        "ts": "33",
        "rpr": "74",
        "or": "55",
        "form": "-36121",
        "sire": "Time Test",
        "dam_sire": "Dutch Art",
        "stall": 5,
        "weight": "9-4",
        "score": "61.2",
        "model_pct": "40.1%",
        "fair_odds": "2.50",
        "best_dec": "2.88",
        "edge": "-12.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Took him 19 attempts to break his duck but his last three efforts read 121, the latest win coming by a head over 1m3f here eight days ago; 3lb rise fair enough and should stay the extra furlong; shortlisted."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Lednikov",
        "jockey": "Elle-May Croot(5)",
        "trainer": "Ivan Furtado",
        "ts": "62",
        "rpr": "72",
        "or": "59",
        "form": "3-8891",
        "sire": "Footstepsinthesand",
        "dam_sire": "Pivotal",
        "stall": 9,
        "weight": "9-8",
        "score": "50.1",
        "model_pct": "9.7%",
        "fair_odds": "10.29",
        "best_dec": "5.50",
        "edge": "-7.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "All six AW wins have come here (four of them under Elle-May Croot), the latest by more than 7l over 1m6f last month; has been hit with an 8lb rise, but could enjoy the run of the race if reverting to his usual front-running tactics."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Silkies Sib",
        "jockey": "Luke Morris",
        "trainer": "James Owen",
        "ts": "61",
        "rpr": "72",
        "or": "58",
        "form": "322136",
        "sire": "Cotai Glory",
        "dam_sire": "Redback",
        "stall": 1,
        "weight": "9-7",
        "score": "49.7",
        "model_pct": "9.2%",
        "fair_odds": "10.81",
        "best_dec": "8.50",
        "edge": "-0.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Consistent after Boxing Day (1332213) prior to a lesser performance at Chelmsford (1m2f, Polytrack) last time (pulled hard); has run well over 1m3f here, but efforts over this far leave something to be desired."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Late Claim",
        "jockey": "Finlay Bassett(7)",
        "trainer": "John Mackie",
        "ts": "62",
        "rpr": "72",
        "or": "49",
        "form": "2-7226",
        "sire": "Almanzor",
        "dam_sire": "Danehill Dancer",
        "stall": 10,
        "weight": "8-12",
        "score": "49.1",
        "model_pct": "8.5%",
        "fair_odds": "11.71",
        "best_dec": "13.00",
        "edge": "-0.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Mainly performed well after making a successful handicap debut at Lingfield (1m5f, Polytrack) in December, but needs to put a lesser effort over C&D 15 days ago behind her; first-time tongue-tie."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Backer Bilk",
        "jockey": "Jack Dace(5)",
        "trainer": "David Killahena & Graeme McPherson",
        "ts": "68",
        "rpr": "71",
        "or": "58",
        "form": "23235-",
        "sire": "Ulysses",
        "dam_sire": "Exceed And Excel",
        "stall": 3,
        "weight": "9-7",
        "score": "46.9",
        "model_pct": "6.4%",
        "fair_odds": "15.64",
        "best_dec": "10.00",
        "edge": "-2.4pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Makes his debut for his fourth different stable (same owners) on his 11th outing, having been off since finishing lame at Chelmsford last August; has both his stamina and wellbeing to prove."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "Sycamore Gap",
        "jockey": "Jason Hart",
        "trainer": "Stephen Hanlon",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "-",
        "or": "58",
        "form": "03221/",
        "sire": "Sea The Stars",
        "dam_sire": "Sir Percy",
        "stall": 7,
        "weight": "9-7",
        "score": "46.4",
        "model_pct": "6.0%",
        "fair_odds": "16.53",
        "best_dec": "13.00",
        "edge": "-0.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Sent off 1-3 when making it 17th-time lucky at Newcastle (1m4f, Tapeta) in September 2024; has since left Rebecca Menzies (same owners) and the market should reveal what is expected."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,
        "horse": "Yakhabar",
        "jockey": "Billy Garritty",
        "trainer": "Liam Bailey",
        "ts": "61",
        "rpr": "69",
        "or": "51",
        "form": "970-91",
        "sire": "Ulysses",
        "dam_sire": "Azamour",
        "stall": 8,
        "weight": "9-0",
        "score": "45.9",
        "model_pct": "5.7%",
        "fair_odds": "17.62",
        "best_dec": "8.00",
        "edge": "-4.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Three wins on the AW, the latest a 4l success over C&D last month; 6lb rise will demand more but still respected if maintaining his form; visor returns."
      },
      {
        "rank": 8,
        "horse": "Arth's Gold",
        "jockey": "Joe Leavy",
        "trainer": "Richard Hannon",
        "ts": "60",
        "rpr": "73",
        "or": "60",
        "form": "-64537",
        "sire": "Havana Gold",
        "dam_sire": "Dansili",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "9-9",
        "score": "45.7",
        "model_pct": "5.5%",
        "fair_odds": "18.08",
        "best_dec": "11.00",
        "edge": "-1.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "0-11 but placed in two of his three starts over 1m3f here, on both occasions when sporting a new type of headgear; each-way claims again based on those efforts."
      },
      {
        "rank": 9,
        "horse": "Heartened",
        "jockey": "Cam Hardie",
        "trainer": "Ollie Pears",
        "ts": "58",
        "rpr": "70",
        "or": "49",
        "form": "3136-4",
        "sire": "Camacho",
        "dam_sire": "Lomitas",
        "stall": 2,
        "weight": "8-12",
        "score": "45.7",
        "model_pct": "5.5%",
        "fair_odds": "18.15",
        "best_dec": "23.00",
        "edge": "+3.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Sole win in 16 starts came at Newcastle (1m2f, Tapeta) last September; still only 1lb higher but has stamina to prove on her first attempt at this trip."
      },
      {
        "rank": 10,
        "horse": "Easter Sundae",
        "jockey": "Joanna Mason",
        "trainer": "John Wainwright",
        "ts": "27",
        "rpr": "68",
        "or": "46",
        "form": "/9-062",
        "sire": "Polish Power",
        "dam_sire": "Multiplex",
        "stall": 6,
        "weight": "8-9",
        "score": "41.6",
        "model_pct": "3.2%",
        "fair_odds": "30.74",
        "best_dec": "29.00",
        "edge": "+1.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "0-13; first placing when beaten just over a length into second of nine in first-time cheekpieces at Newcastle (1m4f, Tapeta; 100-1) seven weeks ago; remains to be seen if the form can be repeated."
      }
    ]
  },
  {
    "course": "Bath",
    "time": "17:25",
    "race_name": "Ella Bury Always In Our Hearts Handicap (Div I)",
    "type": "flat",
    "surface": "Turf",
    "dist": "1m",
    "going": "Good",
    "class": "Class 6",
    "draw_bias": "none",
    "draw_strength": 2,
    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,
        "horse": "Volendam",
        "jockey": "Jack Doughty",
        "trainer": "Tony Carroll",
        "ts": "44",
        "rpr": "68",
        "or": "53",
        "form": "422623",
        "sire": "Muhaarar",
        "dam_sire": "Dark Angel",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "9-7",
        "score": "49.4",
        "model_pct": "14.9%",
        "fair_odds": "6.73",
        "best_dec": "4.33",
        "edge": "-9.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Regressive maiden who's been turned over as favourite a couple of times on the AW of late, latterly looking to have no complaints at a very short price; claims again back on turf for the first time for her current yard but there can only be so many excuses."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Ciotog",
        "jockey": "Billy Loughnane",
        "trainer": "Mark Loughnane",
        "ts": "61",
        "rpr": "71",
        "or": "55",
        "form": "70-455",
        "sire": "Dandy Man",
        "dam_sire": "Jeremy",
        "stall": 3,
        "weight": "9-9",
        "score": "49.0",
        "model_pct": "14.1%",
        "fair_odds": "7.07",
        "best_dec": "6.00",
        "edge": "-2.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Four-time C&D winner (good, soft), all in the autumn off higher marks; may just be on the downgrade but the handicapper's been quick to ease off and Billy Loughnane is back up for the first time this year."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Miss Moonshine",
        "jockey": "Oliver Searle(5)",
        "trainer": "Rod Millman",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "66",
        "or": "48",
        "form": "0-4819",
        "sire": "Outstrip",
        "dam_sire": "Showcasing",
        "stall": 7,
        "weight": "9-2",
        "score": "46.0",
        "model_pct": "10.0%",
        "fair_odds": "10.01",
        "best_dec": "29.00",
        "edge": "+7.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Has not run on turf since 2023 and this is the first time she's ever gone beyond 7f; typically inconsistent since since eight-month layoff and it could well be all or nothing again."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Baynoona",
        "jockey": "Millie Wonnacott(5)",
